allow: Bash(node -e "const w = require\(''/c/Claude Projekte/05 - Nomad Fitness/data/workouts.json''\); console.log\(''Total workouts:'', w.length\); console.log\(''Categories:'', [...new Set\(w.map\(x=>x.category\)\)]\); console.log\(''Levels:'', [...new Set\(w.map\(x=>x.level\)\)]\); console.log\(''With youtubeId:'', w.filter\(x=>x.youtubeId\).map\(x=>x.id\)\)")
